calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Feb-15-2012 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:20am
Judge Pro Tem Joseph Jedekin, clerk- Julie Rumsey, nothing on record, dept 525. Caused called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Vic Hejmadi appears Pro Per. Respondent Sylvie Leotin appears Pro Per. Parties previously sworn, testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Jedekin.
EXHA(1): Declaration of Appeal by Appellant.
EXHR(A): Sylvie Leotin Documents.

Evidence is retained. Matter is submitted.

9:39am

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Nov-16-2011 Judgment Entered
